description: Opt-in contract for wiring the full-roster convergence loop to the evidence repository adapter (SANGUO-RAGOPS-0601). Defines env-var gates, allowed tables, write semantics, and isolation invariants. The convergence loop never modifies JSONL canonical outputs; all writes are mirror-only idempotent upserts to the repository backend.

optIn.description: Set to '1' to enable evidence repository writes from the convergence loop. Default is disabled (any value other than '1' disables writes).

repoMode.description: Repository mode forwarded to RepositorySettings.from_env(). Inherits SANGUO_RAG_REPO_MODE if convergence-specific var not set.

dryRun.description: Default is dry-run (1). Set to '0' to issue real writes. A non-empty string other than '0' is treated as dry-run.

policyPath.description: Path to this policy file relative to repo root. Override to swap policy without touching code.

writeSemantics.description: All writes are idempotent ON CONFLICT upserts. The evidence repository is a mirror only; JSONL canonical export remains the source of truth. The 'canonicalWrites' field is always set to false for all convergence-loop rows.

roundWritePolicy.description: After each convergence round completes, evidence_cards are extracted from the round's externalCardsPath and globalCandidateCardsPath. Cards with unknown reviewStatus are coerced to 'candidate'. source_runs rows are emitted with fetch/seed/card counts from the round's externalSummary.

runWritePolicy.description: On run completion, a pipeline_runs row is written with the convergence loop's runId, stopReason, and summary.

errorHandling.description: Repository write errors are appended to the error ledger inside the run root. The convergence loop continues even if repository writes fail — isolation invariant: evidence repo errors never abort the main pipeline.
